error.signature: StatusCode.RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED: Received message larger than max (4194304 vs. 4194304)

verdict.summary: gRPC message exceeds the default 4MB limit. Large responses, file transfers, or accumulated data.

dead_ends.action: Remove message size limit entirely on both sides
dead_ends.why_fails: No limit means a single large or malicious message can crash the process with OOM

dead_ends.action: Compress messages at application level before sending
dead_ends.why_fails: gRPC has built-in compression. Application-level compression adds complexity without benefit.

workarounds.action: Increase max message size on both client and server
Use gRPC streaming for large data transfers
workarounds.how: Stream data in chunks instead of one large message: rpc StreamData(stream Chunk) returns (Result)
